title: Esquisse
description: Adds a sketchbook for you to draw EVERYTHING!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/C9mE8jaSqQU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

______________________________________________________________________________________________

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/423b32f6639aa1997af0f633e4beed0ed7ea7ba1_0.webp)

# VERSION **0.3.0** IS OUT! 
CHECK THE CHANGELOG FOR DETAILS

Did you ever wanted to draw your humble starter house? Or you stumbled upon a cool mountain, but you have nothing with you? Or maybe even you wanted to draw your lovely pet, but...ugh? No worries, I got you! Here's THE sketchbook.

~~Seriously, why nobody ever did that?~~ Heavily inspired by [Xerca's Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/project/YOs4tZea)

## Key Features:

- **Craft a Sketchbook** and open a custom drawing interface!

- **Drawing Tools**: Craft a pencil and eraser to draw! (There's no joy without them...)

- **Advanced Canvas**: The drawing interface allows you to change your brush size, adjust the pencil hardness and even rotate or drag the sketchbook around your screen for maximum comfort.

- **Tear & Share**: Proud of your masterpiece? Tear the page right out of your sketchbook! The torn page becomes a separate item that preserves your drawing, complete with a custom tooltip showing a thumbnail of your art

- **Additional Tools**: You can use ruler, drawing compass, etc. to enhance your precision!

- **Decorate Your World**: You don't have to keep your art in a chest. Shift + RMB on any wall with your sketch to hang it up like a painting! RMB on it to rotate
  
- _You can even make spooky notes like those in the woods left by that guy in a tuxedo_

## Controls:

![sketchbook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e54a7057b37d74004ba0f88ceec5a4c4236c5c8.png)
- _In inventory: grab an empty page/paper and RMB on the Sketchbook to restock with pages_
- **Hold LMB** on a spine (narrow part on the side) to move across the screen
- **Hold LMB** on a blue button to rotate the sketchbook. **RMB** to reset rotation
- **RMB** on the red dotted line in between to tear out a page
- **LMB** on the bookmarks to flip through

![pencil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e062522dd7391b567e1c1fcd294673628cc6d64.png)
- **B** to select
- **LMB** to draw
- **Mouse Wheel (MW)** to change size: 1px, 2px, 3px
- **Shift+MW** (or **RMB** on it in the toolbar) to change hardness: 2H, HB, 4B

![color pencil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c9f4ea22bbf5c6b2cc6326f47c4135bab8fc526.png)
- _In inventory: grab a dye and RMB on Color Pencil to load it with corresponding color_
- **C** to select
- **LMB** to draw
- **MW** to change size: 1-3px
- **Shift-MW** (or **RMB** on it on the toolbar) to change hardness: 2H, HB, 4H
- **LMB** on any color swatch in a color palette on the right to choose (only loaded colors are shown)

![color marker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3e34baade6c19fd9a1fa89e98bd1dc735f810b9.png)
- _In inventory: grab a dye and RMB on Color Marker to load it with corresponding color_
- **V** to select
- **LMB** to draw
- **MW** to change size: 2x5, 3x10, 4x15
- **Shift-MW** (or **RMB** on it on the toolbar) to change opacity: L, M, H
- **LMB** on any color swatch in a color palette on the right to choose (only loaded colors are shown)
- **Alt+MW** to rotate the brush with 15° increment

![eraser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2555b9eb1e802d3f27c94d56d81b3c88ad094e87.png)
- **E** to select
- **LMB** to erase
- **MW** to change size: 1-3px

![kneaded eraser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4368f0c48a92214af9e91031de53c905b401e87d.png)
- **W** to select
- **LMB** to erase
- **MW** to change size: 1-3px
- **Shift+MW** to change hardness

![smudge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0c15b80d6b3d83d5244cd0c273152f47f25b731.png)
- **S** to select
- **LMB** to smudge pixels
- **MW** to change size
- **Shift+MW** to change hardness

![ruler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8d2c7e17ffe9201f9a299228505c9f48dcc77ff.png)
- **R** (or **LMB** on it on the toolbar) to call it in
- **RMB** or **R** again to dismiss
- **Hold LMB** to move it across
- **Shift+LMB** to rotate
- **Shift+R** to "quick-call": press to create first anchor point, while holding place cursor anywhere to create a second one.

![magglass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e1bec8c767785b77dfc71c32654bd330b69baa0.png)
- **LMB** on it on the toolbar to toggle drawing with magnifying glass
- **RMB** to dismiss
- **Hold Z** to "quick-call" it. Release to dismiss

![drawing compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d085666ead0ef54999d59b663203e203411cb86a.png)
- **D** to select/dismiss
- **Drag mouse** to choose position/radius
- **RMB** to revert to previous state (Choosing radius -> Positioning -> Dismissing)
- **Hold Shift+D** to "quick-call" it. Release to dismiss
___________________________________________________
